drafts.title: Цена с НДС и без НДС — как правильно сравнивать поставщиков
drafts.intent: MOFU/BOFU — procurement manager comparing commercial proposals
drafts.overlap: Somewhat similar to existing 'sravnit-tseny-postavschikov-s-nds-i-bez' but focuses specifically on the decision-making scenario rather than price list format
drafts.notes: Concrete procurement scenario with supplier A vs B comparison. Clear value vs existing article.

drafts.title: Как проверить НДС в счёте или акте — пошаговая инструкция
drafts.intent: BOFU — accountant verifying invoice before payment
drafts.overlap: Shares translation_key 'vat-invoice-check' with existing 'proverit-nds-v-schete-akte-nakladnoy'. Draft focuses on счёт/акт only (narrower), existing covers счёт/акт/накладная (broader).
drafts.notes: Different translation_key from existing (this is 'check-vat-in-invoice-or-act', existing uses 'vat-invoice-check'). Intent is narrower — счёт and акт only. No direct cannibalization but close pair.

drafts.title: НДС 20% и 10% — в чём разница и примеры расчёта
drafts.intent: MOFU/TOFU — understanding VAT rates and choosing correct one
drafts.overlap: No existing article covers 20% vs 10% rate distinction with detailed calculation examples. Existing tool page mentions rates briefly.
drafts.notes: New intent not covered by existing articles. Clear tables, 4 calculation examples. Good depth.

drafts.title: Price with VAT vs without VAT — How to Compare Correctly
drafts.overlap: No direct duplicate. Existing EN 'compare-supplier-prices-with-and-without-vat' covers this topic but with different translation_key and focus.
drafts.notes: Russian VAT context clear (₽, Russian legal entities). Adapted from RU version, not literal translation.

drafts.title: How to Check VAT in a Russian Invoice or Act — Step by Step
drafts.intent: BOFU — accountant verifying invoice before payment
drafts.overlap: Shares translation_key with existing EN 'check-vat-in-invoice-receipt-document'. Draft focuses on счёт/акт (narrower), existing covers invoice/receipt/billing (broader).
drafts.notes: Different translation_key from existing (this is 'check-vat-in-invoice-or-act', existing uses 'vat-invoice-check'). Intent is narrower. EN adaptation is natural.

drafts.title: Russian VAT 20% and 10% — What's the Difference and Examples
drafts.intent: MOFU — understanding Russian VAT rate distinction
drafts.overlap: No existing EN article covers 20% vs 10% Russian VAT rate distinction with examples.
drafts.notes: Russian VAT context clearly present. Title starts with 'Russian VAT'. Good adaptation.

cannibalizationMatrix.risk: Both answer 'how to compare prices with and without VAT' but from different angles. Draft focuses on procurement decision-making scenario; existing on price list normalization.
Both cover invoice/document checking. Draft is narrower (счёт+акт only) vs existing (счёт/акт/накладная). Shares 'check-vat-in-invoice-or-act' vs existing 'vat-invoice-check' translation_keys.
cannibalizationMatrix.recommendation: Publish as planned — draft is narrower scope, complementary not cannibalizing

cannibalizationMatrix.risk: Existing tool article mentions VAT rates briefly. Draft is dedicated deep-dive on rate differences.
cannibalizationMatrix.recommendation: Publish as planned — fills a clear gap

cannibalizationMatrix.existingTitle: How to Compare Supplier Prices With and Without VAT
cannibalizationMatrix.risk: Both answer similar query. Draft uses different translation_key. Draft is scenario-focused; existing is broader.
cannibalizationMatrix.recommendation: Publish as planned — different translation_key pairs

cannibalizationMatrix.existingTitle: How to Check VAT in an Invoice, Receipt, or Billing Document Before Payment
cannibalizationMatrix.risk: Both cover invoice VAT checking. Draft is narrower (invoice+act only) vs existing (invoice+receipt+billing). Different translation_keys.
cannibalizationMatrix.recommendation: Publish as planned — draft scope is narrower, complementary

cannibalizationMatrix.risk: Existing tool page mentions VAT rates. Draft is dedicated deep-dive.

taxCautionReview.notes: All articles use 'Калькулятор помогает проверить расчёт, но не заменяет бухгалтерскую консультацию.' (RU) and 'The calculator helps verify the calculation, but it does not replace accounting advice.' (EN). No overpromising language found.

seoQualityCheck.note: FAQ sections differ between articles — no significant duplication
